jobText:
Middle Frontend Engineer (Marketing)
 віддалено
We are looking for a skilled Middle Frontend Engineer with deep technical expertise and a passion for development.

As a Middle Frontend Engineer, you will develop, implement, and optimize marketing funnels that drive engagement, conversions, and revenue. You’ll collaborate closely with marketing strategists and developers to create seamless user experiences and ensure the high quality of the memoryOS project.

Our Core Values: Strong ownership skills, taking responsibility for results, driving tasks to completion, and approaching them with a focus on efficiency and quality.

Ready to be part of a modern, fast-growing, #1 product in its niche while gaining extensive professional growth? Apply now!

Who are we?

memoryOS is the world’s #1 app for improving memory and focus, helping people overcome the forgetting curve and retain needed knowledge. Proven learning and memory techniques are merged with Duolingo-like gamified e-learning with patented virtual mind palace tech. Co-founded by 2X World Memory Champion — Jonas von Essen.

We’re a remote team of 30 diverse, like-minded professionals, united in solving the problem of the forgetting curve.

We are proud to be the Most Funded App on Kickstarter. The memoryOS was featured on TechCrunch and recognized by Google Brands Accelerator as a product that is “light years ahead of any other company in memory space”.

Tech Stack

React
TypeScript
Javascript
Git

What you’ll be working on

Landing Page & Funnel Development

Develop and optimize landing pages optimized for marketing campaigns and dynamic personalization.
Build and optimize marketing funnels & checkout integrations.
Implement advanced form handling, lead capture flows, and multi-step funnel interfaces.
Tracking, A/B Testing & Conversion Optimization

Experience setting up and optimizing A/B testing and personalization strategies using tools such as Convert.com, GrowthBook, Optimizely, etc.
Ensure accurate tracking of marketing pixels, conversion tracking (Facebook Ads, Google Ads, TikTok, etc.), and event triggers.
Debug and troubleshoot frontend tracking issues to ensure data accuracy.
Frontend Performance & UX Optimization

Optimize pages for speed, responsiveness, and SEO, maximizing ad quality scores.
Improve frontend performance using Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse, GTmetrix, Google PageSpeed, lazy loading, asset bundling, etc.
Ensure cross-browser and cross-device compatibility to maximize campaign reach.
Create reusable, modular UI components for rapid deployment.
Collaboration & Technical Integration

Collaborate with developers, QA engineers, designers, Product Owners, and marketing teams to refine tracking and analytics strategies.
Integrate frontend solutions with third-party services and CRMs (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, etc.).
Code Quality & Best Practices

Write clean, maintainable, and efficient front-end code.
Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and product discussions.
Contribute to continuous improvements in performance, scalability, and quality.
Stay up-to-date with industry trends and emerging technologies.
About you

3+ years of proven experience as a Frontend Developer, with a strong focus on building and optimizing web applications or marketing funnels.
Strong proficiency in React.js and TypeScript.
Experience with mobile-first and responsive development across all devices and browsers.
Understanding of REST APIs and frontend architecture principles.
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
Proactive, reliable, and committed to self-development in a dynamic business environment.
English level B1+ or higher.
Optional green flags:

Experience with rich UI applications (animations, parallax, visually intensive components).
Payment systems integration (Stripe, Solidgate, etc.).
Experience working with WebView.
Developing admin interfaces and internal tools.
Integration of A/B testing frameworks and analytics services.

You will also get

Developing solutions that have a direct impact on business.
Transparent management and regular feedback.
The opportunities to be involved in interesting and useful product for millions of people.
The modern team of like-minded and diverse professionals.
Enjoy a vacation and paid sick leave days to relax every year.
Fully remote: you are free to choose your productive work time and place.
Getting the job

Enjoy building a top-level product with us while gaining extensive professional experience in a company with an important mission.

Step-by-step for this position:

Screening interview (up to 1 hour): To discuss the position, check basic competencies, and culture fit.
Technical interview (2 hours): Detailed сase approach to identify experience, technical skills, and core competencies.
Full Day (up to 5 hours): Have an opportunity to work all day with the team, solve tech problems, and write code.
Referral: Recommendations from the previous workplace.
Offer call (30 min): Discussion of a Job Offer Proposal.
Let’s make the world remember!

tailored.headline: Middle Frontend Engineer (Marketing) | React.js, TypeScript, Next.js
tailored.summary: Frontend Developer with 5+ years of hands-on experience building and optimizing marketing landing pages, multi-step funnels, and high-traffic web applications using React.js, TypeScript, and Next.js. Delivered end-to-end features across marketing, checkout, and analytics domains — from architecture to production — with a strong focus on performance, SEO, and conversion optimization. Comfortable working cross-functionally with designers, PMs, backend engineers, and marketing teams in fast-moving product environments.

bullets: Designed and delivered performance-critical marketing landing pages using Next.js, integrating product analytics, tracking scripts, and A/B testing configurations that boosted user conversion rates by ~15%
Owned the architecture of a monorepo solution built from scratch using Nx, unifying 3 products (marketplace, admin dashboard, landing pages) and maximizing UI component and business logic reuse
Developed core features of a high-traffic crypto marketplace (50K+ MAU), including secure authentication, a multi-step order creation engine, and advanced search with dynamic filtering
Built a real-time P2P communication layer using WebSockets, enabling live chat messaging and status synchronization between buyers and sellers within active transactions
Delivered a comprehensive admin panel with financial dashboards, role-based access control (RBAC), subscription management, and dispute resolution tools
Established CI/CD pipelines, production monitoring, and code review workflows to ensure reliable end-to-end delivery
Collaborated directly with clients, founders, PMs, BAs, and backend teams to translate business goals into scalable technical roadmaps
Designed and delivered a high-performance, SEO-optimized marketing landing page from scratch using Next.js, driving B2B user acquisition through optimized page speed and search rankings
Improved client-side performance (LCP, TTI) through code-splitting and lazy loading, reducing overall bundle size by ~10% and optimizing widget load times by ~15%
Owned the implementation of a secure subscription and billing system via Stripe integration, covering multi-tier pricing pages, billing management, and transaction status workflows
Built an isolated embeddable chat widget using Shadow DOM and WebSockets, ensuring clean DOM containment and real-time AI response delivery on third-party client websites
Delivered an Integrations Hub enabling users to connect Slack, Telegram, and Webhooks to forward chatbot leads and notifications to external platforms
Refactored the data-fetching layer using TanStack Query, establishing robust caching, background revalidation, and consistent state synchronization across the app
Integrated Sentry for error tracking and production monitoring, significantly reducing debugging time and improving application observability
Delivered a high-performance, SEO-optimized marketing landing page using Next.js, implementing semantic HTML, custom meta tags, and responsive layouts to maximize search ranking and conversion
Designed and shipped an interactive Widget Builder (Alert Box, Goal Progress) allowing full customization of colors, layouts, sounds, typography, and animation triggers for OBS overlays
Implemented OAuth integrations with Twitch, YouTube, and Kick to streamline streamer authorization, profile sync, and live broadcast status tracking
Built data-heavy analytical dashboards featuring responsive tables (1000+ rows), complex pagination, transaction filtering, and interactive financial charts for real-time revenue tracking
Developed multi-step configuration forms with advanced validation for donation thresholds, media file constraints, and profanity filtering
Collaborated with backend engineers to integrate REST APIs and WebSockets for global state management using Redux and real-time alert distribution
Delivered pixel-perfect, cross-browser-compatible layouts from Figma designs using clean, maintainable SCSS across all device sizes

coverage.requirement: 3+ years of proven experience as a Frontend Developer
coverage.evidence: 5+ years of experience across 3 companies (Nov 2020 – Present)

coverage.requirement: Strong proficiency in React.js and TypeScript
coverage.evidence: React.js and TypeScript listed as core stack across all 3 roles

coverage.requirement: Experience with mobile-first and responsive development across all devices and browsers
coverage.evidence: DonateSystem: 'cross-browser compatibility across all device sizes'; AMO FINTECH: responsive landing pages

coverage.requirement: Understanding of REST APIs and frontend architecture principles
coverage.evidence: REST API integration at DonateSystem; monorepo architecture at KYC Market; data-fetching architecture at AMO FINTECH

coverage.requirement: Experience building and optimizing web applications or marketing funnels
coverage.evidence: Marketing landing pages at KYC Market (A/B testing, ~15% conversion boost), AMO FINTECH (SEO, LCP/TTI optimization), and DonateSystem (Next.js SEO landing)

coverage.requirement: Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
coverage.evidence: Code audit and bug fixing at AMO FINTECH; pixel-perfect Figma delivery at DonateSystem
English listed as Professional level in spoken languages

coverage.requirement: Experience with rich UI applications (animations, parallax, visually intensive components)
coverage.evidence: Widget Builder with animation triggers at DonateSystem; pixel-perfect UI delivery — no explicit parallax/animation-heavy work mentioned
Stripe subscription and billing system implemented end-to-end at AMO FINTECH

coverage.requirement: Developing admin interfaces and internal tools
coverage.evidence: Admin panel with RBAC, financial dashboards, and dispute tools at KYC Market; admin dashboard stabilization at AMO FINTECH

coverage.requirement: Integration of A/B testing frameworks and analytics services
coverage.evidence: A/B testing configurations and product analytics integrated at KYC Market landing pages — specific tools (Convert.com, GrowthBook, Optimizely) not named in master CV

coverage.requirement: Conversion tracking, marketing pixels, Facebook/Google/TikTok Ads
coverage.evidence: Tracking scripts integrated at KYC Market landing pages — specific ad platforms not named in master CV

coverage.requirement: Core Web Vitals / Lighthouse / GTmetrix / Google PageSpeed optimization
coverage.evidence: LCP and TTI improvements at AMO FINTECH; ~10% bundle size reduction and ~15% widget load time improvement — specific tooling (Lighthouse, GTmetrix) not named

tailored.match_notes: Kostya is a strong technical match for the core stack — React.js, TypeScript, Next.js, responsive development, REST APIs, Stripe, and SEO-optimized landing pages are all well-evidenced. The A/B testing and conversion optimization experience at KYC Market is directly relevant, though the specific tools the role names (Convert.com, GrowthBook, Optimizely) are not mentioned in the master CV — worth clarifying in an interview. The main gaps are: (1) No WebView experience mentioned anywhere. (2) No CRM integrations (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign) — this is a notable gap for a marketing-focused role. (3) Specific ad-platform pixel work (Facebook Ads, Google Ads, TikTok) is implied by "tracking scripts" but not explicitly stated — risky to claim without evidence. (4) The role targets a Middle-level engineer; Kostya's actual seniority is Senior, which may raise expectations or salary misalignment concerns — the CV has been framed to emphasize hands-on delivery and feature ownership rather than team leadership to avoid appearing overqualified.

keyword_coverage.location: summary, KYC Market bullet 1, AMO FINTECH bullet 1, DonateSystem bullet 1
summary, top_skills, AMO FINTECH bullet 1, DonateSystem bullet 1

format_checks.rule: All experience bullets start with an action verb
No passive constructions (Responsible for / Helped with)
Standard sections present (headline, summary, skills, experience)
No special characters or ASCII art that break parsers

format_checks.note: The 'projects' array is empty. ATS parsers may flag a declared-but-empty section; either populate it or remove the section entirely.
